languages.text:
"Философ, покорить дерзнувший смерть,
Он ныне подошел к ее преддверью.
В чертогах плоти, сломлен, изнурен,
Но горд. И отрицает поражение".

"The sage who dared to conquer death and time,
Now stands before its threshold, past his prime.
Within the halls of flesh, both crushed and spent,
Yet proud. Defeat he never shall consent."
languages.original_text:
"Философ, покорить дерзнувший смерть,

Но горд. И отрицает поражение".

languages.text:
«El sabio que osó conquistar la muerte y el tiempo
se encuentra ahora ante su umbral, pasado su momento.
En los salones de la carne, magullado y agotado,
conserva aún su orgullo. No aceptará la derrota como resultado».
languages.original_text:
"The sage who dared to conquer death and time,
Now stands before its threshold, past his prime.
Within the halls of flesh, both crushed and spent,
Yet proud. Defeat he never shall consent."

languages.text:
“敢将死亡与光阴征服的贤者，
如今伫立门扉之前，风华已谢。
血肉殿堂之中，他破碎而力竭，
却傲然不屈，永不向失败妥协。”
languages.original_text:

Now stands before its threshold, past his prime.
Within the halls of flesh, both crushed and spent,
Yet proud. Defeat he never shall consent."

languages.text:
"Der Weise, der trotzte der Zeit und dem Tod
Steht nun an der Schwelle in großer Not.
In den Hallen des Fleisches stolz und allein
Gesteht die Niederlage er niemals sich ein."
languages.original_text:
"The sage who dared to conquer death and time,
Now stands before its threshold, past his prime.
Within the halls of flesh, both crushed and spent,
Yet proud. Defeat he never shall consent."

languages.text:
« Le sage qui a conquis la mort et le temps,
se tient à présent sur son seuil sénescent.
Dans les salles de chair, accablé et las,
mais toujours aussi vaillant. La défaite jamais il n'acceptera. »
languages.original_text:
"The sage who dared to conquer death and time,
Now stands before its threshold, past his prime.
Within the halls of flesh, both crushed and spent,
Yet proud. Defeat he never shall consent."

languages.text:
"Ölüme ve zamana meydan okumaya cüret eden o bilge,
Artık en parlak dönemini geride bırakmış, onun eşiğinde.
Etin o salonlarında, hem ezilmiş hem de tükenmiş hâlde,
Yine de gururlu. Yenilgiye asla boyun eğmeyecek şekilde."
languages.original_text:
"The sage who dared to conquer death and time,
Now stands before its threshold, past his prime.
Within the halls of flesh, both crushed and spent,
Yet proud. Defeat he never shall consent."

languages.text:
死と時を征服した勇者の姿は、
今はその門を目前に、
盛りの過ぎた姿で立つ。
肉体の殿堂に、
打ち砕かれ、疲れ果てた姿は、
それでも誇りを持つ。
敗北を許すことは決してない。
